/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ar qc lib_maix_hal_static.a CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/maix_hal_module.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_gpio.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_uart.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_spi.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_i2c.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_camera.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_display.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_nn.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/bind_pwm_adc.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/_maix_hal_static.dir/tflite_runner.cpp.obj
/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ranlib lib_maix_hal_static.a
